text:
Once upon a time in the magical forest of Eldoria, there lived a sprite named Gwyron. Gwyron was a cheerful little creature known for its dazzling wings. Every dawn, it flew out from its nest in the old oak tree and danced through the dewy understory.

One bright morning, Gwyron heard some strange noises near the river. Intrigued, it flew down to investigate. There was a mysterious book tucked under a large stone by the water. Reading the first few lines, Gwyron discovered that someone was capturing frogs for their unique croaks.

Gwyron decided to help. It collected frogs with melodious tweets, flying them down to the riverbank into ponds. Soon frogs everywhere began to sing. Gwyron realized that the frogs loved their new singer.

It returned the book to its spot, filled with tales of enchantment. Gwyron flew off to organize frog opera evenings. People from all around came just to hear the frog singers.
